problem.zh: 多家企業 in-house App 需依場域動態調整表單欄位，逐案重寫成本高。
problem.en: Multiple enterprise in-house apps needed dynamic forms without per-client rebuilds.

solution.zh: 以 MVVM 設計 JSON 驅動表單引擎；涵蓋保全、航空、健檢、電信等場域（不公開客戶與 App 名稱）。
solution.en: MVVM JSON-driven form engine for security, aviation, health checkup, telecom in-house apps (client names not disclosed).

zh: 客戶端 Xamarin 技術教育

text.zh: 某保全業 in-house App：MVVM 動態表單架構，帶領 7 人、6 個月
text.en: Security industry in-house app: MVVM dynamic forms, led 7 engineers, 6 months

text.zh: 某航空業 in-house 工單 App：動態表單 + 至客戶端 Xamarin iOS 授課 5 天
text.en: Aviation in-house work-order app + 5-day Xamarin iOS client training

text.zh: 某健檢／電信／金融等 in-house 專案：動態表單、硬體串接、PM/SA 角色
text.en: Health, telecom, banking in-house projects: dynamic forms, hardware integration, PM/SA roles
